reviews.review_description: I want my money back! Csnt even play  against anyone, network issues with this game, terrible game through and through it’s not fun and it’s not even worth a single penny.

There is no multiplayer or online networks.  The physics are extremely unrealistic and the bots are terrible as well, I do not recommend.
no server found on network for multiplayer

I looked at the video and it seemed like an okay game but after i wasted $15 on it i was very disappointed. This game is actually so bad from the mechanics to the ai system that plays against you and it claims its multi player but its really not. Please do not buy this game you will be so mad after you play it

I bought this and within three minutes I realize that the effort put in to make this as real as possible was lacking. I requested a refund and for some reason this would not refund me my money. So I’m stuck with it. This app should be removed as an allowable purchase. 

Have complete work over done by the developers. Then, offer the new update to those who purchased at no cost. I think the ratings would go up significantly.
To sensitive
Horrible game. Wish I could get my money back.

I really like ping pong, but I'm about ready to give up the game after playing this piece of trash.   It looks good, so no problem there, but the mechanics of the game are just plain bad.   It is very difficult to play, you get no sense of feeling in the game and I guarantee you will want a refund like myself, but of course, you don't get one.   Please don't waste your cash.

reviews.review_title: It’s not what I was looking for
reviews.review_description: It is a fun and entertaining experience but it is not what I was looking for for two reasons first ￼it is not at all what ping pong is in real life and it is not consistent in how the ball moves but if you are not trying to play irl than it is worth the download
This is the worst game I have ever played it is impossible to beat the easiest bot and is just very unrealistic

This game sucks when I first played it I thought it was good but now I don't think it's good at all when I try to hit the ball it goes flying the different way when I try to serve it it doesn't let me serve it only lets me hit the ball but it doesn't go anywhere this game just sucks in general you can't play with online people but it says it does and the bots don't really work that well and the graphics are good but that's it it sucks I wish I could get a refund

This game is very sensitive the little tap you give to the ping pong ball it flies too far and to fast. It won’t even keep the ball on the table.

reviews.review_description: Complete garbage . Not playable, not fun , you will be dissatisfied.

I really wish I had read the reviews before I bought this game.   This shouldn't even be allowed to be sold.   The ball goes where it wants, because I think it's trying to find a way out of the game.   I know If I was the ball, that's what I would be doing.  It's that bad.
What even is this? It was good the first round but the second I couldn’t even serve the ball so I had to let the bot win. This doesnt deserve to be on the oculus store.
I wish I could get my money back. The ball is way too sensitive. Pick a different game.
Really glitchy, not fun. The other ping pong game in the store called “eleven” is much better. Going to try to get a refund for this game. Needs to be removed or free.

reviews.review_title: It is not that much accurate.

reviews.review_title: Horrible game, do not waste your $$$
reviews.review_description:
I played the  ET the Extra Terrestrial game for the Atari.  It was considered one video games in history.  It sucked so bad  they pulled the games from the market and buried them in a landfill in the western US.  The game was so bad it was credited with starting the collapse of the entire video game industry in the early 1980s.

VR PIng pong pro is almost as bad as that ET game.  The physics of the game are horrible.  The VR  paddle does not sit properly in your hand and it cannot be adjusted.  Sometimes a light tap will send the ball flying away and sometimes it just dribbles onto the table like someone with a case of gonorrhea.  Sometimes when you do manage to keep the ball from flying away or dribbling into the net when it hits your opponents side, rather than bouncing it simply slides off the table.

I wish I could give the game less than one star
I hate it it holds the paddle wired and when you hit it it goes flying
great experience
